audit_items.proof_trace: When startingPriceMultiplier == endingPriceMultiplier, the inner subtraction yields delta=0, so mulDiv(0, elapsedTime, auctionDuration)=0, and priceMultiplier = startMult - 0 = startMult. Both the inner and outer subtractions are safe; Solidity 0.8+ checked arithmetic would revert on any underflow, and input validation in _applyAssetParamsUpdates (L653-657) enforces endingPriceMultiplier <= startingPriceMultiplier and auctionDuration != 0 for all auctioned assets.
